items.title: Farmer Advisory Sent
items.description: Groundwater depletion alert sent. 1,240 farmers notified via SMS to adopt micro-irrigation.

items.title: Wetland Encroachment Detected
items.description: Unauthorized encroachment detected in Deepor Beel wetland area. Forest dept notified.

items.title: Deforestation Detected
items.description: AI detected 340 hectares of rapid tree cover loss. Satellite confirmed. Authorities alerted.

items.title: Flood Risk Rising
items.description: Kosi river at 87% capacity. Flood warning issued. NDRF teams on standby.

items.title: Plantation Priority Generated
items.description: AI recommends urgent afforestation in 3 zones. Priority plantation schedule generated.

items.title: Cyclone Watch Active
items.description: Low pressure system in Bay of Bengal tracking toward Odisha coast. Storm watch active.

items.title: Illegal Logging Activity
items.description: Sound anomaly sensors detected chainsaw activity. Real-time alert sent to forest rangers.

items.title: Extreme Heat Advisory
items.description: Surface temperature exceeds 48°C. Advisory issued for outdoor laborers and livestock.
